Layout.name: FAT Package

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "level" ; 1 ) & SetProperty ( "package_dir" ; FAT Package::Export Package Sub Path ) & SetProperty ( "package_friendly_id" ; FAT Package::JSON Friendly id ) & SetProperty ( "package_type_name" ; FAT Package::Package type name ) & SetProperty ( "fat_version" ; FAT Package::FAT version number )
IsEmpty (FAT Title::Base project) Or IsEmpty (FAT Package::Local export type) Or notDeveloper

"data:text/html, <!DOCTYPE html> <html lang=\"en\"> <head> <meta charset=\"UTF-8\"> </head> <body> <script> function openURL(url, windowName) { // Open the URL in the specific window window.open(url, windowName); } </script> </body> </html>"
"View all media with subtitles in title"
"View all text styles defined in title"

SetProperty ( "fat_title_id" ; FAT Title::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "funkis_cloud_title_id" ; FAT Title::Funkis Cloud Title id ) & SetProperty ( "title_environment" ; FAT Title::Title Environment )
FAT Title::Title isLive Or FAT Title::Title Backend ≠ "Funkis Cloud"
Not FAT Title::Title isLive Or FAT Title::Title Backend ≠ "Funkis Cloud"
SetProperty ( "numberOfChildrenField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Package::Number of chapters )) & SetProperty ( "sortField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Chapter::SortIndex )) & SetProperty ( "action"; "up")
SetProperty ( "numberOfChildrenField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Package::Number of chapters )) & SetProperty ( "sortField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Chapter::SortIndex )) & SetProperty ( "action"; "down")
isTranslator Or isEditor Or FAT Chapter::Proxy type = "page"

LayoutObject.name: Eye 2
Eye with stroke 2
Eye 2
Eye with stroke 2
Page info 2
Chapter info 2
Page info 2
Chapter info 2

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "item_type" ; "Chapter" ) & SetProperty ( "item_id" ; FAT Chapter::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "item_parent_id" ; FAT Chapter::Parent id) & SetProperty ( "item_parent_type" ; "Package" ) & SetProperty ( "item_level" ; 2 ) & SetProperty ( "proxy_type" ; FAT Chapter::Proxy type )
isEditor Or isTranslator //or FAT Chapter::Proxy type = "page"
Not FAT Tag::PrimaryKey Or Baseproject Codebase Version @ Package::FAT Version="FAT 1.0.0"
"Select for which IO context this tag should work in"
PatternCount (JSONGetElement ( FAT Tag Value @ PK::Tag Value JSON ; "valuelist_id" ) ; "funkis-cloud")
"How will this package behave if the user doesn't have the tag active?"
Not FAT Tag::PrimaryKey Or Baseproject Codebase Version @ Package::FAT Version="FAT 1.0.0"
"No description available - feel free to add one."
Not FAT Tag::PrimaryKey Or isTranslator Or Baseproject Codebase Version @ Package::FAT Version="FAT 1.0.0"
isEditor Or isTranslator Or PatternCount ( Package type::Name ; "Site" ) Or PatternCount ( Package type::Name ; "Title info" )
isEditor Or isTranslator Or Not PatternCount ( Package type::Name ; "Site" ) And Not PatternCount ( Package type::Name ; "Title info" )
isEditor Or isTranslator Or PatternCount ( Package type::Name ; "Site" ) Or PatternCount ( Package type::Name ; "Title info" )

StyledText.Data: Add an item to this package

Calculation.Text: "Package name is visible in browser's window bar, navigation menu and in splash."
"Package name is visible in browser's window bar, navigation menu and in splash."
FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≤ FAT Package::View hierarchy level Package And FAT Overview::Package id = FAT Package::PrimaryKey And FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Package"

LayoutObject.name: Page info

Calculation.Text: FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 2

LayoutObject.name: Chapter info
Package info
Page item info Copy

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) Or Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) And IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page item" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 3

LayoutObject.name: Page info Copy

Calculation.Text: FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 3

LayoutObject.name: Page item info Copy2

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) Or Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) And IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page item" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 4

LayoutObject.name: Page info

Calculation.Text: FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 2

LayoutObject.name: Chapter info
Package info
Page info

Calculation.Text: FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 2

LayoutObject.name: Chapter info
Package info
Page item info Copy

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) Or Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) And IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page item" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 3

LayoutObject.name: Page info Copy

Calculation.Text: FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 3

LayoutObject.name: Page item info Copy

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) Or Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) And IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page item" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 3

LayoutObject.name: Page info Copy

Calculation.Text: FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 3

LayoutObject.name: Page item info Copy2

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) Or Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) And IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page item" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 4

LayoutObject.name: Page item info Copy2

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) Or Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) And IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page item" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 4

Title.Text: "The image shows how the content is organised in the FAT and which levels are available for each package type."

StyledText.Data: <<ƒ:Case ( Package type name = "Slide"; "Chapters: " & Number of chapters & " Page items: " & Number of page items; "Chapters: " & Number of chapters & " Pages: " & Number of pages & " Page items: " & Number of page items ) >>

LayoutObject.name: "Modifier Portal"

Calculation.Text: FAT Modifier @ Package::Importance = 1 And PrivilegeAccess ( FAT Modifier @ Package::Privilege ) And FAT Modifier @ Package::Modifier group ≠ "6ACA9335-DE6F-461E-A964-EAA2705C265D" //main menu

LayoutObject.name: Media filename

Calculation.Text: SetProperty("title_id"; FAT Link MV @ Package::Title id) & SetProperty("link_type"; FAT Link MV @ Package::Link type) & SetProperty("item_id"; FAT Link MV @ Package::Internal Item id) & SetProperty("item_type"; FAT Link MV @ Package::Internal item type) & SetProperty("link_url"; FAT Link MV @ Package::Link ModifierValue)

"Link behaviour: " & FAT Link MV @ Package::Link behaviour & "¶" & "Item type: " & FAT Link MV @ Package::Internal item type & "¶" & "URL: " & FAT Link MV @ Package::Link ModifierValue & "¶" & "Click to follow link."
FAT Modifier @ Package::Type ≠ "Link" Or IsEmpty ( FAT ModifierValue @ Package::Value )
FAT Modifier @ Package::Type ≠ "Value list radio" Or ValueCount ( FAT Modifier @ Package::ValuesList) < 3
FAT Modifier @ Package::Type ≠ "Value list radio" Or ValueCount ( FAT Modifier @ Package::ValuesList) > 2

StyledText.Data: <<FAT Modifier @ Package::Description>> Input type: <<FAT Modifier @ Package::Type>> Access: <<FAT Modifier @ Package::Privilege>>

Calculation.Text: FAT Modifier @ Package::Type ≠ "String" And FAT Modifier @ Package::Type ≠ "Prettified string" And FAT Modifier @ Package::Type ≠ "URL encoded string" And FAT Modifier @ Package::Type ≠ "Number" And FAT Modifier @ Package::Type ≠ "Sync server path"
FAT Modifier @ Package::Type ≠ "Media" Or Not SubtitleMedia ( Media MV PK::Container file extension )

LayoutObject.name: Media inout

Calculation.Text: PrivilegeAccess ( FAT Modifier @ Package::Privilege ) And FAT Modifier @ Package::Modifier group = "6ACA9335-DE6F-461E-A964-EAA2705C265D" // "Main menu"

LayoutObject.name: Media filename 2

Calculation.Text: FAT Modifier @ Package::Type ≠ "Value list radio" Or ValueCount ( FAT Modifier @ Package::ValuesList) < 3
FAT Modifier @ Package::Type ≠ "Value list radio" Or ValueCount ( FAT Modifier @ Package::ValuesList) > 2

StyledText.Data: <<FAT Modifier @ Package::Description>> Input type: <<FAT Modifier @ Package::Type>> Access: <<FAT Modifier @ Package::Privilege>>

Calculation.Text: FAT Modifier @ Package::Type ≠ "String" And FAT Modifier @ Package::Type ≠ "Prettified string" And FAT Modifier @ Package::Type ≠ "URL encoded string" And FAT Modifier @ Package::Type ≠ "Number" And FAT Modifier @ Package::Type ≠ "Sync server path"
FAT Modifier @ Package::Type ≠ "Media" Or Not SubtitleMedia ( Media MV PK::Container file extension )

LayoutObject.name: Media inout 2

StyledText.Data: Download package for delivery You will be notified with an email including download links when your package is built and ready for download.

Calculation.Text: IsEmpty ( FAT Package::Delivery format ) Or isTranslator Or FAT Package::Package Backend = "Funkis Cloud"
IsEmpty ( FAT Package::Delivery format ) Or isTranslator Or FAT Package::Package Backend

SetProperty ( "title_id" ; FAT Title::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "item_type" ; "Package" ) & SetProperty ( "item_id" ; FAT Package::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "link_type" ; "Internal" ) & SetProperty ( "link_name" ; "Link to package " & FAT Package::Reference name )
FAT Link @ Package::PrimaryKey Or isTranslator Or isEditor

SetProperty ( "title_id" ; FAT Title::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "item_type" ; "Package" ) & SetProperty ( "item_id" ; FAT Package::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "link_type" ; "Internal" ) & SetProperty ( "link_name" ; "Link to package " & FAT Package::Reference name )
Not FAT Link @ Package::PrimaryKey Or isTranslator
"Select for which IO context this tag should work in"
PatternCount (JSONGetElement ( FAT Tag Value @ CH::Tag Value JSON ; "valuelist_id" ) ; "funkis-cloud")
"How will this page item behave if the user doesn't have the tag active?"
Count ( FAT Score variable::PrimaryKey )=0 Or isTranslator
Count ( FAT Score variable::PrimaryKey )=0 Or isTranslator

StyledText.Data: IMPORTANT! To make interaction of this portal work in WebDirect: No grouped items in portal Text fields - such as media filename positioned in the bottom.

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "item_type" ; "Page") & SetProperty ( "item_id" ; FAT Page::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "item_parent_id" ; FAT Chapter::PrimaryKey) & SetProperty ( "item_parent_type" ; "Chapter" ) & SetProperty ( "item_level" ; 3 )
isEditor Or isTranslator Or FAT Chapter::Proxy type = ""
